seo.title: Frontend Developer Resume Examples & ATS Templates 2026
seo.description: Write a perfect Frontend Developer resume that passes ATS in 2026. Includes top React/TypeScript keywords, common mistakes, and a complete resume example.
seo.keywords: frontend developer resume, react developer resume, UI developer resume template, frontend engineer ATS resume 2026
seo.ogDescription: The exact resume template that lands React developer interviews at top companies.

hero.title: Frontend Developer Resume Examples
hero.description: Your frontend portfolio is built — now make your resume match it. These templates and tips will ensure you pass the ATS and land the interview.

mistakes: Listing only technologies without showing outcomes (e.g., 'Used React' vs 'Built a React dashboard used by 50k daily active users').
No links to deployed projects or GitHub — for frontend roles, this is mandatory.
Listing every CSS framework you've touched instead of highlighting depth in 2-3 core tools.
tips: Always include links to live demos and GitHub repos for every project.
Quantify performance improvements: 'Improved Lighthouse score from 62 to 96' is extremely impressive.
Use keywords from the specific job description in your skills section to maximize ATS match.

exampleResume.name: Marcus Johnson
exampleResume.title: Senior Frontend Developer
exampleResume.summary: Frontend engineer with 5+ years of experience building high-performance React and Next.js applications. Reduced Core Web Vitals LCP by 58% at scale. Passionate about accessibility, design systems, and developer experience.

bullets: Built the core product catalog UI with React + TypeScript, supporting 2M monthly users across 12 countries.
Led Core Web Vitals optimization initiative, improving LCP by 58% and CLS by 82%, increasing organic search traffic by 34%.
Designed and implemented a Figma-to-code Design System of 60+ components, reducing new feature development time by 40%.
Developed 20+ responsive landing pages with Next.js and Tailwind CSS for SaaS clients, averaging 98/100 Lighthouse scores.
Integrated Stripe payments and Google Analytics tracking, contributing to $1.2M in attributable revenue.

exampleResume.skills: React.js, TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Redux Toolkit, React Query, GraphQL, Jest, Cypress, Webpack, Vite, Figma, AWS S3 + CloudFront
